title: Data Not Saving
description: Fix issues where files or applications are failing to save data locally.
keywords: data not saving in my laptop

steps.instruction: Check your available disk space. Open 'This PC' and ensure your 'C:' drive is not completely full (you need at least a few Gigabytes free).
Verify folder permissions. You cannot save files to folders like 'Program Files' or root 'C:\' without administrator access. Try saving the file to your 'Documents' or 'Desktop'.
If saving to a Network Drive or OneDrive, ensure you have an active internet connection.
Check if an antivirus software is blocking the application from writing to the disk.
Try 'Save As...' and choose a different location or filename. If the original file is open by another user or process, it will be locked.
